---
title: "Leadership"
description-meta: "Leadership, service and community engagement."
toc: false
page-navigation: false
---

<style>

#quarto-margin-sidebar,
#TOC,
.sidebar,
.toc,
nav[role="doc-toc"]{
    display:none !important;
}

main.content{
    max-width:950px !important;
}

.intro{
    font-size:18px;
    line-height:1.8;
    margin-bottom:45px;
    text-align:justify;
}

.lead-section{
    font-size:30px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:#0B57D0;
    margin-top:50px;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    border-bottom:2px solid #0B57D0;
    padding-bottom:8px;
}

.item{
    margin-bottom:38px;
}

.item-title{
    font-size:23px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:#8B0000;
    margin-bottom:8px;
}

.item-place{
    font-size:17px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#555;
    margin-bottom:10px;
}

.item-desc{
    font-size:17px;
    line-height:1.8;
    text-align:justify;
    color:#000;
}

</style>

<div class="intro">

Leadership and service have been central to my academic and personal development. Throughout my educational journey, I have actively contributed to student governance, academic mentorship, community engagement, and volunteer initiatives that promote learning, collaboration, and social impact.

</div>

<div class="lead-section">
Leadership Roles
</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Academic & Scholarship Committee Chairperson
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Jubilee Hall (International Hostel), University of Ghana • 2024 – Present
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Lead academic initiatives within the hall, coordinate student learning activities, promote scholarship opportunities, and work with stakeholders to enhance the academic experience of resident students.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Deputy Chairperson, Academic Committee
</div>

<div class="item-place">
University of Ghana Actuarial and Statistics Society • 2024
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Supported the planning and coordination of academic programmes, tutorials, and departmental activities aimed at improving student learning and engagement.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Chief Clerk
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Jubilee Hall Parliament, University of Ghana • 2023
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Managed parliamentary records, coordinated legislative proceedings, and ensured effective documentation of parliamentary activities.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Marshall
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Jubilee Hall Parliament, University of Ghana • 2023
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Maintained order during parliamentary proceedings and assisted in the smooth organization of parliamentary sessions and events.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Treasurer
</div>

<div class="item-place">
General Arts Students' Association, Potsin T.I. Ahmadiyya Senior High School • 2019–2020
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Managed financial records and supported the planning and execution of student association activities.
</div>

</div>

<div class="lead-section">
Mentorship & Community Service
</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Peer Mentor
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Compassion International Ghana • 2021
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Provided academic, personal, and career guidance to younger students while encouraging leadership, confidence, and educational development.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Staff Financial Secretary
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Home for Hope Preparatory School, Gomoa West Education District • 2021
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Supported financial administration and record keeping while contributing to the effective management of school operations.
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-title">
Pandemic Educator
</div>

<div class="item-place">
Economics Department, Potsin T.I. Ahmadiyya Senior High School • 2020
</div>

<div class="item-desc">
Participated in public education initiatives during the COVID-19 pandemic, promoting health awareness and responsible preventive practices within the school community.
</div>

</div>
